Title: Check Initial Configuration Status
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application.
2. Check if the initial configuration status is queried.
Expected Result: The system queries if the initial configuration has been performed.

Title: Add Vehicle Manually
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application.
2. Confirm initial configuration is not done.
3. Proceed to add a vehicle.
4. Choose to insert the vehicle manually.
5. Enter vehicle details.
6. Confirm addition.
Expected Result: The vehicle is added successfully.

Title: Add Vehicle from Dataset
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application.
2. Confirm initial configuration is not done.
3. Proceed to add a vehicle.
4. Choose to search the vehicle in the dataset.
5. Search for the vehicle.
6. Select and add the vehicle.
7. Confirm addition.
Expected Result: The vehicle is added successfully from the dataset.

Title: Access Distributor List
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application.
2. Confirm initial configuration is done.
3. Access the distributor list.
Expected Result: The distributor list is displayed.

Title: Customize Sorting Parameters
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application.
2. Confirm initial configuration is done.
3. Access the distributor list.
4. Choose to customize sorting parameters.
5. Set custom sorting parameters.
6. Confirm update.
Expected Result: The distributor list is updated according to the custom sorting parameters.

Title: Navigate to Distributor
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application.
2. Confirm initial configuration is done.
3. Access the distributor list.
4. Select a distributor.
5. Open navigation app automatically.
6. Confirm navigation completion.
Expected Result: Navigation to the selected distributor is completed successfully.

Title: Display Settings
Test Steps:
1. Access the settings page.
2. Confirm display of settings.
Expected Result: The settings are displayed.

Title: Change Screen
Test Steps:
1. Access the settings page.
2. Confirm display of settings.
3. Choose to change screen.
4. Access distributor list page via navigation bar.
Expected Result: The user is redirected to the distributor list page.

Title: Modify Vehicle List
Test Steps:
1. Access the settings page.
2. Confirm display of settings.
3. Choose to modify vehicle list.
4. Modify vehicle list.
5. Confirm modification.
6. View confirmation pop-up.
Expected Result: The vehicle list is modified successfully and a confirmation pop-up is displayed.

Title: Stay on Settings Page
Test Steps:
1. Access the settings page.
2. Confirm display of settings.
3. Choose not to change screen.
Expected Result: The user remains on the settings page.

Title: Do Not Modify Vehicle List
Test Steps:
1. Access the settings page.
2. Confirm display of settings.
3. Choose not to modify vehicle list.
Expected Result: The user remains on the settings page without modifying the vehicle list.

Title: Negative Scenario - Invalid Vehicle Details
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application.
2. Confirm initial configuration is not done.
3. Proceed to add a vehicle.
4. Choose to insert the vehicle manually.
5. Enter invalid vehicle details.
6. Attempt to confirm addition.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed indicating invalid input.

Title: Negative Scenario - No Distributors Found
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application.
2. Confirm initial configuration is done.
3. Access the distributor list.
4. Confirm no distributors are found.
Expected Result: A message is displayed indicating no distributors are available.

Title: Negative Scenario - Invalid Settings Modification
Test Steps:
1. Access the settings page.
2. Confirm display of settings.
3. Choose to modify settings with invalid data.
4. Attempt to confirm modification.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed indicating invalid settings data.

Title: Edge Case - Multiple Vehicles Addition
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application.
2. Confirm initial configuration is not done.
3. Proceed to add a vehicle.
4. Choose to insert the vehicle manually.
5. Enter first set of vehicle details.
6. Confirm addition.
7. Repeat steps 4-6 for additional vehicles.
8. Confirm final addition.
Expected Result: All vehicles are added successfully.

Title: Edge Case - Custom Sorting and Navigation
Test Data: Custom sorting parameters and distributor details
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application.
2. Confirm initial configuration is done.
3. Access the distributor list.
4. Choose to customize sorting parameters.
5. Set custom sorting parameters.
6. Confirm update.
7. Select a distributor.
8. Open navigation app automatically.
9. Confirm navigation completion.
Expected Result: The distributor list is sorted according to custom parameters and navigation to the selected distributor is completed successfully.

Title: Edge Case - Multiple Screen Changes
Test Steps:
1. Access the settings page.
2. Confirm display of settings.
3. Choose to change screen.
4. Access distributor list page via navigation bar.
5. Return to settings page.
6. Choose to change screen again.
7. Access statistics page via navigation bar.
8. Return to settings page.
Expected Result: The user can navigate between different pages via the navigation bar successfully.

Title: Edge Case - Vehicle Selection from Dataset and Manual Entry
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application.
2. Confirm initial configuration is not done.
3. Proceed to add a vehicle.
4. Choose to search the vehicle in the dataset.
5. Search for the vehicle.
6. Select and add the vehicle.
7. Confirm addition.
8. Proceed to add another vehicle.
9. Choose to insert the vehicle manually.
10. Enter vehicle details.
11. Confirm addition.
Expected Result: The vehicle is added successfully from the dataset and another vehicle is added manually.

Title: Edge Case - Multiple Distributor Selections
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application.
2. Confirm initial configuration is done.
3. Access the distributor list.
4. Select a distributor.
5. Open navigation app automatically.
6. Confirm navigation completion.
7. Repeat steps 4-6 for additional distributors.
Expected Result: Navigation to each selected distributor is completed successfully.

Title: Edge Case - Multiple Vehicle Modifications
Test Steps:
1. Access the settings page.
2. Confirm display of settings.
3. Choose to modify vehicle list.
4. Modify first set of vehicle details.
5. Confirm modification.
6. View confirmation pop-up.
7. Repeat steps 3-6 for additional modifications.
Expected Result: All vehicle modifications are confirmed successfully and corresponding confirmation pop-ups are displayed.

Title: Negative Scenario - No Vehicle Selection
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application.
2. Confirm initial configuration is not done.
3. Proceed to add a vehicle.
4. Choose to search the vehicle in the dataset.
5. Confirm no vehicle is found.
Expected Result: A message is displayed indicating no vehicle was found in the dataset.

Title: Negative Scenario - No Customization Options Available
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application.
2. Confirm initial configuration is done.
3. Access the distributor list.
4. Confirm customization options are not available.
Expected Result: A message is displayed indicating no customization options are available.

Title: Negative Scenario - No Screen Change Options
Test Steps:
1. Access the settings page.
2. Confirm display of settings.
3. Choose to change screen.
4. Confirm no screen change options are available.
Expected Result: A message is displayed indicating no screen change options are available.

Title: Edge Case - Multiple Vehicle Additions with Different Methods
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application.
2. Confirm initial configuration is not done.
3. Proceed to add a vehicle.
4. Choose to insert the vehicle manually.
5. Enter first set of vehicle details.
6. Confirm addition.
7. Proceed to add another vehicle.
8. Choose to search the vehicle in the dataset.
9. Search for the vehicle.
10. Select and add the vehicle.
11. Confirm addition.
Expected Result: Both vehicles are added successfully using different methods.

Title: Edge Case - Multiple Customizations and Navigations
Test Data: Multiple sets of custom sorting parameters and distributor details
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application.
2. Confirm initial configuration is done.
3. Access the distributor list.
4. Choose to customize sorting parameters.
5. Set first set of custom sorting parameters.
6. Confirm update.
7. Select a distributor.
8. Open navigation app automatically.
9. Confirm navigation completion.
10. Repeat steps 4-9 for additional customizations and selections.
Expected Result: The distributor list is updated according to custom parameters and navigation to each selected distributor is completed successfully.

Title: Edge Case - Multiple Settings Modifications and Screen Changes
Test Data: Multiple sets of settings data and screen change requests
Test Steps:
1. Access the settings page.
2. Confirm display of settings.
3. Choose to modify settings.
4. Modify first set of settings data.
5. Confirm modification.
6. View confirmation pop-up.
7. Choose to change screen.
8. Access distributor list page via navigation bar.
9. Return to settings page.
10. Repeat steps 3-9 for additional modifications and screen changes.
Expected Result: All settings modifications are confirmed successfully and the user can navigate between different pages via the navigation bar successfully.
